title: Optuna tuning strengthened the F1 channel models

text: Optuna tuning strengthened the F1 channel models

text: Average accuracy: 46.0% before tuning -> 53.6% after tuning

text: Strongest channel gains: DRS accuracy 55.0% -> 76.4%; throttle balanced accuracy 24.0% -> 47.1%
